name: firebase-modeling
description: "Use when designing Firestore collections, Firebase security boundaries, repository adapters, and domain mappers."
---

# firebase-modeling

## 用途
- Firestore schema
- Security rules
- Firebase adapters
- Domain mapper

## 產出
- collection / document 命名建議
- 安全邊界檢查點
- mapper 與 adapter 分工
